about.title: About ToolsArena
about.metaTitle: About ToolsArena — Who Built It & Why It's Free
about.metaDescription: ToolsArena is a free tools platform I built from Lucknow, India. Every tool runs in your browser — no uploads, no signups. Here's the story behind it.
about.intro: Hey, I'm Mukesh. I started ToolsArena in early 2025 because I was tired of the same problem most people face online — you search for a simple tool like an image compressor or a JSON formatter, and you land on a site that asks you to sign up, limits your usage, or quietly uploads your files to some server you know nothing about.
about.backstory: I figured I could build something better. I'm a full-stack developer based in Lucknow, India, and I spend most of my time writing code anyway. So I started building these tools one by one — each one runs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. There's no backend processing, no account walls, nothing like that. It's just you and the tool.
about.browserProcessing: That's the part I'm most particular about. When you compress an image or convert a PDF here, the processing happens right on your machine using JavaScript. I don't see your files. I don't store them. I can't even if I wanted to — the architecture doesn't allow it. That's a deliberate choice, not a marketing line.
about.howItWorksText: ToolsArena is built with Next.js and React. Every tool is a standalone client-side component — meaning the heavy lifting happens in your browser tab using Web APIs, Canvas, and libraries like pdf-lib and tesseract.js. The server only delivers the page. After that, it's all local. You can even turn off your internet after the page loads and most tools will still work.
about.whyPrivacy: Your files stay on your device.
about.whyPrivacyDesc: Nothing gets uploaded. I built it this way on purpose — I don't want your data and I don't need it.
about.whyFreeDesc: No "free tier" that runs out after 3 uses. No premium upsells. Every tool, every feature — free.
about.whyNoSignupDesc: You don't need to hand over your email just to resize a photo. Open the tool, use it, done.
about.whyFastDesc: Since everything runs locally in your browser, there's no waiting for server responses or upload progress bars.
about.contactText: If you have a tool idea, found a bug, or just want to say hi — I'd genuinely love to hear from you.
about.founderBio1: I'm a software engineer who likes building things that are actually useful. I've worked with Laravel, React, Next.js, and a bunch of other stuff over the years. ToolsArena started as a side project — I'd build a tool whenever I personally needed one, and then I figured other people probably needed it too.
about.founderBio2: I maintain this whole platform myself. Every tool, every page, every line of code. If something's broken or could be better, that's on me — and I want to know about it. You can reach me on LinkedIn or just send me an email.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for ToolsArena. Read our usage terms and conditions.
terms.acceptanceText: By using ToolsArena, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
terms.useOfServicesText: ToolsArena provides free online tools for personal and commercial use. You may not use our platform for: illegal activities, harassment, distributing malware, or any activity that violates applicable law.
terms.intellectualPropertyText: The ToolsArena name, logo, and website design are owned by ToolsArena. The open-source libraries used (Next.js, pdf-lib, etc.) are used under their respective licenses. QR codes generated with our tool are in the public domain.
terms.disclaimerText: ToolsArena tools are provided "as is" without warranty. We are not responsible for any data loss, incorrect calculations, or other issues arising from tool usage. Always verify critical calculations independently.
terms.limitationText: ToolsArena shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our tools.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of ToolsArena after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: ToolsArena privacy policy. Learn how we handle your data — all processing is done locally in your browser.
privacy.dataText: ToolsArena is designed with privacy as the first principle. We do not collect, store, or transmit any files, text, or personal data you use with our tools. All tool processing happens entirely in your browser using JavaScript.
privacy.analyticsText: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect anonymous usage statistics such as page views, device type, and geographic region. This helps us understand which tools are popular and improve our platform. No personally identifiable information is collected.
privacy.advertisingText: We display advertisements via Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to serve personalized ads based on your interests. You can opt out of personalized ads by visiting Google's Ad Settings.
privacy.cookiesText: We use minimal cookies: one for your theme preference (dark/light mode). Analytics and advertising cookies are set by Google. We do not use session cookies or tracking cookies for our own purposes.
privacy.thirdPartyText: Our website uses: Google Analytics (analytics), Google AdSense (ads), Google Fonts (typography). Each service has its own privacy policy governing their data practices.
privacy.contactText: For privacy concerns, contact us at privacy@toolsarena.in
